feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BW/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP BW/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CDS View IFICOMPANYCODE not extracting all codes
entry.content:
Hi there

S4H Public Cloud CDS View I_COMPANYCODE shows all codes available. We are using IFICOMPANYCODE to extract the codes into BW4H. But we don't get all codes as shown in I_COMPANYCODE.

Any ideas?

Thanks!

entry.title: Activating PSCD Business Content and Finding Datasource for Table DFKKKO
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need to activate the business content for PSCD. 

I have a specific question regarding extractors in PSCD. I am trying to determine which extractor includes the table DFKKKO. How can I find out which PSCD extractor this table is associated with?

Thank you in advance for your assistance!

Best regards,
Norman

entry.title: Check "Only retrieve last request" disabled - DTP Full
entry.content:
I have a DTP in extraction mode: Full, and I cannot activate the check:"Only retrieve last request"

I sending data between 1 ADSO Data Mart (plannig) to a Standard ADSO.

Does anyone know why it doesn't active?

entry.title: Questions for SAC Live Data Connections for BW
entry.content:
Hello, I was checking the procedure for BW Live connections:

1. I have a S/4HANA 1610 version. Is this version compatible with SAP to configure connectivity with SAC? Please confirm If I can use this version for S/4HANA connectivity with SAC.

2. In the link below, step "2c", appears one image which is selected in a red rectangle. There, appear 8 items from auth until ValueHelp. My question is if all these items need to appear there, because in step "e", are mentioned only 6 services them to be activated.

3. Is it necessary a separated SAP BW to configure this procedure? 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/c1cbf644b0a1434fbb4ea072a0562286.html?locale=en-US

Regards,

*Name*


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: RRI to R/3 (BW-Query jump to ABAP in R/3)
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created a BW-Query and in the rsbbs I have created a RRI to our R/3 system for a transaction.

When I jump from the query to the R/3 transaction, a new window opens in the webgui and I get the message: no authorisation for the transaction RSRR_WEB:

Question: why is the window opening in the web GUI? I expect a window to open in the SAP GUI.

We are now in BW4HANA. We had no problem with BW on HANA.

Thank you

entry.title: 0GL_account hierarchy load successfully but Not showing in Bex Query in BW Modeling tool.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am excited to share my first article with you.

I was doing a development on 0GL_Account hierarchy node in Bex Query in BW Modeling tool I've come across a strange issue that needs addressing. Here's the problem and solution.

I am sharing this solution in the hope that it will be helpful😊

problem

In RSH1 are able to see the levels of 0GL_Account hierarchy but while creating a Bex query hierarchy contains some levels and not all are visible to restrict and some GL accounts are appearing under a dimension (like REST_H) that are not available to restrict in Bex query.

Solution

window> preferences > BW modeling > Query designer

Change the maximum number of levels as per your requirement.

Refer below SAP note for your reference.

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2933554

Thanks & Regards,

Swati

entry.title: BW/4HANA BW Query usage statistics
entry.content:
Hi guys!

My guess is that I am completely lost and I do not know how to use the BW/4HANA Cockpit.

What I'm looking for is the BW Query usage statistics (than I used to find in the old BEx Query). Now, I know that the old content was moved to BW/4HANA Cockpit but I am not able to find the BW Query usage.

I find out that I can use 2CRVCOLAPSTATAQ to get what I need, but me guess is that this "query" has to be also in the cockpit.  So far I'm looking into the app Data Volumen Statistics and Data Selection Statistics. But I looking something like the result of query 2CRVCOLAPSTATAQ.  Something like this exists in the BW4 Cockpit?

Thanks in advance, Oscar A.

entry.title: The Process Chain detail screen is not displaying the complete count of runs and error
entry.content:
The detail screen for any Process Chain is not showing the full count of runs and error counts.

Environment: SAP_BASIS=756 ; DWCORE=300

Thanks in advance for any help and support.

Thanks,

Vishala.

entry.title: Tables for BW-Query Elements (where-used list)
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to find the tables in BW in which I can see where a characteristic with the filter/constant (e.g. company code = 1111) is used in the following BW query elements (where-used list):

Global restricted key figures
Filter
Local restricted key figures

Unfortunately, I have not found the best solution. We are on BW4HANA.

Thanks

entry.title: InfoObject Assignment is missing in SAP BW/4HANA for Transformations
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm encountering a problem during creating a Transformation of type Lookup.

I cannot find any option for Assigning InfoObjects in BW Modeling Tools.

I'm using SAP BW/4HANA 2.0.

entry.title: Process Chains - Start an S/4 job only after successful completion of IBP Application Job Template
entry.content:
Hi,

The context here is to try and schedule an S4 job only upon successful completion of an IBP job. Is this possible within the "Processes" of IBP itself?

Alternatively, is this possible from the standard S/4 HANA CLOUD or BW/4HANA Process Chains (RSPC)? Perhaps utilize CI-DS? Or is an external scheduling tool such as Redwood always needed?

Kind regards,
V.

entry.title: How it works flag NOT IF FAILED from process type Check if Previous Run of the Chain is Still Active
entry.content:
I'm trying to understand how the process typ Check if Previous Run of the Chain is Still Active works.

I Have understand how the options Previous run must be finished since and Wait for the previous run to finish for works, but I haven't understand how to use/work the flag Not if failed.  According to SAP documentation Not if failed,  you can stipulate that previous runs that failed count as inactive (option 1) immediately. 

I understand option 1 is inactive, option 2 active and option 3 failed

My process event is configure as follows

Intentionally, the last run of the process chain end it in red, so I assumed that the next run, with the flag Not if failed set, will take option 1 but it doesn't, it keeps taking option 3.  Any clues?

 

 

 

Thank you all, Oscar

entry.title: 2LIS_02_ITM custom fields delta not working properly S/4HANA
entry.content:
Greetings SAP experts,

I know that this topic was raised a lot of times before, but many topics are outdated, the links are not working anymore, or I could simply not understand the solution shared.

We are currently facing some delta issues with some custom fields which were enhanced in 2LIS_02_ITM extractor via RSU5_SAPI_BADI by a previous team. The changes do not get reflected properly.

While reading plenty of posts around the community I found out about EXIT_SAPLRSAP_001 and EXIT_SAPLEINS_001 customer exits. This might be the key, but I am not sure about the code which should be implemented.

Can someone explain in dummy details which exit should be used in order to make the delta work for our custom fields and share a sample of code which can be further adapted for each field?

I really appreciate your support and I am sorry if I missed any post which could help. I passed through everything which I found out but still didn't understand how to make it work.

The source system is S/4HANA 2022.

 

Please help!

Kind regards,

Alex

entry.title: Can we create a file as TAB delimited via Open Hub and store in AL11?
entry.content: Can we create a file as TAB delimited via Open Hub and store in AL11?We dont want to create a , or ; delimited File and then use a Program to make it tab delimited,due to the data corruption risk.

entry.title: SAP Analytics cloud script
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am using SAP SAC on BW Live. My Source is a Bex query with 2 structures, Key figure structure (Columns) and Non-Key Figure Structure (Rows). I have a table with (Row/Column) described above and a Numeric Point (KPI) that needs to show the required row value when the table row is clicked. Since using a structure for (rows) I cannot use Linked analysis as it does not understand the context. (Screenshot below) Table to the right and KPI on the left.

 

I am trying to use script to get selected Key per row in the table without success. My result is the Key of the structure, I m not able to get the keys for the objects in the structure. Like listed below.

 

I get that by doing the following.

 

The issue I have is trying to use script to get selected Key per row in the table. I have tried different combinations of the script below without success.

 

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: How to correct invalid time dependent MD in SAP BW
entry.content:
Issue :

  • In 0MAT_PLANT incorrect data loaded for Time Dependent master data .        

        

Reason :

  • When loading master data if we select below mentioned checkbox then it will consider as new record and it will create one new wrong entry in Q table

         

Resolution :

  • Execute RSDMD_CHECKPRG_ALL program to correct "From Date" for errored record 
    • First execute RSDMD_CHECKPRG_ALL program in check mode so that you will come to know that how many records have issue in data as per below screen shot :

               

    • Once you get list of Material and Plant which is in error you will get list then execute the same program to repaire the data.
    • So once you executed above program in repaire mode then you will see "from date" is adjusted properly.

                 

  • Then create self loop transformation for 0MAT_PLANT to update releavent attributes.
    • Write a code in end routine ( ABAP / AMDP ) in newly created transformation in such away that whatever next future records is available we need to set same attributes for errored record. ( This may vary based on business )
    • So in this example i need to show in ZVSSTA_TD = Z1 & ZORDTO_TD = Y for errored record.
    • When i executed self loop DTP for newly created transformation i can able to see below output which we were expecting.

entry.title: Detailed Phased approach for BW/4HANA In-place conversion across landscapes
entry.content:
We have a few general questions about the Phased approach option for the BW/4HANA In-place conversion across the system landscapes. We are confused about the attached image that shows a four phased approach where you would Convert the Development System, Transport and test scenario in Test, and then Transport and Go-live with Scenario in Production. So, our confusion is when we Transport our Phase 1 to Production and our Process chains run that evening in prod, will the converted objects load data from the new ODP data-sources, and the non-converted objects load data from the old SAPI data-sources.

Additionally, can we assume that during Phase 1, when we start the conversion of objects in the (STC01) Conversion Task List and we run into issues, we will fix and collect those objects into a Transport request and continue until the conversion is complete.

Then, we will Transport those requests from Dev to QA, and we will again convert those same objects using (STC01) in QA. 

Thanks, 

Norm

entry.title: BW Query create cumulative value
entry.content:
Hello All,

Kindly please check below 2 scenario's and help to create the BW Query in BW4HANA.

Scenario 1:

We have the values like below

GL Account Costcenter fiscal year period value1 value2 value3 value4 etc.

  123456      2345          001.2024             100     200     300       400

                                       002.2024

                                        003.2024 etc

 

if we select the fiscalyear period 001.2024 value1 should be show =100

if we select the fiscalyear period 001.2024 to 002. 2024 value should be shown like 300 (Value 100 +200)

if we select the fiscalyear period 001,2024 to 003.2024 value should be shown like  600 (Value 100+200+300) like 12 periods.

Scenario 2:

if we select the period 001.2024 value should be 100

if we select the period 002.2004 value should be 200

if we select the period 003.2024 value should be 300 show like 12 periods

Please check and help me to create the new BW Query.

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: S_RS_CDS_X vs S_RS_CDS_S
entry.content:
Dear BW / HANA Experts,

Could you please provide some details on Auth objects S_RS_CDS_X vs S_RS_CDS_S. As i checked in google, the documents are not available.

Thanks.

entry.title: start routine with Contains
entry.content:
Hello All,

Could you please help me, how to write the Start Routine using with Contains for below scenario.

 

i am getting the data from source value KSFG000275C45000 if its contains 0275 it should be add the source field bukers = 0275.

Please provide me the code.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.
